stability_detail: All modes above -5.0 cm^-1. Structure is dynamically stable.
data_source_note: Phonon dispersion constructed from published Hg-family cuprate data. NOT actual DFPT output. Replace with real ph.x + matdyn.x results when available. Sources: Jepsen et al. JPCS 1998, Renker et al. ZPB 1996, Pashitskii & Pentegov LTP 2008, Bohnen et al. PRL 2001 [UNVERIFIED - training data]

convergence_test_plan.criterion: max|omega_coarse - omega_fine| < 5 cm^-1 at high-symmetry points

expected_physics_notes: Hg1223 max phonon freq ~650-700 cm^-1 << H3S ~2000 cm^-1
Cu-O stretching modes (390-590 cm^-1) carry strongest e-ph coupling
Heavy Hg atom contributes low-frequency modes with weak e-ph coupling
No imaginary modes expected at ambient pressure for optimally doped Hg1223
LO-TO splitting at Gamma for O modes: ~20-50 cm^-1 in cuprates
